face.note: Face detection coordinates for this face with live confidence levels.

respiratory_rate.note: Global estimate of Respiratory Rate using vitallens-2.0, with confidence level.

hrv_rmssd.note: Global estimate of Heart Rate Variability (RMSSD) using vitallens-2.0, with confidence level.

hrv_sdnn.note: Global estimate of Heart Rate Variability (SDNN) using vitallens-2.0, with confidence level.

respiratory_waveform.note: Estimate of the Respiratory Waveform using vitallens-2.0, with frame-wise confidence levels.

hrv_lfhf.note: Global estimate of Heart Rate Variability (LF/HF) using vitallens-2.0, with confidence level.

ppg_waveform.note: Estimate of the PPG Waveform using vitallens-2.0, with frame-wise confidence levels.

heart_rate.note: Global estimate of Heart Rate using vitallens-2.0, with confidence level.

message: The provided values are estimates and should be interpreted according to the provided confidence levels ranging from 0 to 1. The VitalLens API is not a medical device and its estimates are not intended for any medical purposes.
